title: biscutella dufourii
intro: Biscutella dufourii, also known as Dufour's biscuitroot, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Biscutella dufourii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
